summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Evol India Shop major feature update. All 18 requested features working perfectly: Admin authentication (admin/admin123), admin dashboard with 3 tabs (Inventory, Banners, Settings), bulk CSV upload, enhanced product schema with new fields, stock badges on product cards, hero slider, enhanced footer with store details, and CMS settings functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 19 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Admin login: POST /api/admin/login with admin/admin123 works correctly
Admin authentication: JWT token verification working
Admin dashboard: Three tabs (Inventory, Banners, Settings) present and functional
Bulk Upload CSV: Button present in admin inventory tab with format help
Product schema: New fields (color, ram_rom, stock_count, images[]) working
Stock badges: 'In Stock'/'Out of Stock' shown on product cards (not exact numbers)
Product detail page: Stock badges displayed correctly
Hero slider: Promotional banners with navigation arrows and dots
Footer: Store address 'Delhi Rohtak Road, Metro Pillar 844' displayed
Footer: 'View on Google Maps' button present and functional
Footer: 'Chat on WhatsApp' button present with correct styling
Footer: Developer credit 'Developed with ❤️ by Developer' shown
Settings API: GET /api/settings returns shop configuration
Settings CMS: Admin can edit shop name, address, phone, developer name
Banner API: GET /api/banners returns active promotional banners
Banner management: Admin can add/edit/delete banners in CMS
SEO: Page title 'Evol India Shop - Best Mobiles & Accessories in Bahadurgarh'
Database: 37 products seeded with enhanced schema fields
Admin CRUD: Create, read, update, delete operations with authentication
Stock management: Decrement stock functionality working
Product categories: Mobile/Accessories filtering functional
Navigation: All menu items (Home, Mobiles, Used Phones, Accessories) working
